name: groundtruth-local-mvp
description: Offline-first desktop takeoff app with local AI workflows

scripts.bundle: pnpm --filter @groundtruth/frontend build && pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/setup_tesseract_resource.ps1 && pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/bundle_sidecar.ps1 && pnpm --filter @groundtruth/tauri build
